summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification shard. No GitHub mutations planned; no shared canonical exists. Hydrated open PRs are kept as independent backlog items unless live state was missing from the preflight artifact. Security-sensitive PR #81364 is routed to central OpenClaw security handling.
